command.context: 直接打开霸王别姬豆瓣详情页

code_block:
# ── 步骤 1：直接打开霸王别姬豆瓣详情页
            try:
                await page.goto('https://movie.douban.com/subject/1291546/', wait_until="domcontentloaded")
                await page.wait_for_timeout(CONFIG["spa_settle_ms"])
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_1_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 3：提取片名
            try:
                _sel = '#wrapper h1'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_3_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 4：提取评分和评价人数
            try:
                _sel = '#interest_sectl'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_4_error.png")
                raise

command.context: 向下滚动查看剧情简介

code_block:
# ── 步骤 5：向下滚动查看剧情简介
            try:
                await page.evaluate("window.scrollBy(0, 300)")
                await page.wait_for_timeout(600)
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_5_error.png")
                raise

# ── 步骤 6：提取剧情简介
            try:
                _sel = '#link-report-intra'
                _lim = 9999
                await _wait_for_content(page, _sel)
                _texts = await page.evaluate(_EXTRACT_JS, [_sel, _lim])
                _out = CONFIG["output_dir"] / 'movie.txt'
                _out.write_text("\n".join(_texts), encoding="utf-8")
                print(f"已提取 {{len(_texts)}} 条，写入 {{_out}}")
            except Exception:
                await page.screenshot(path="step_6_error.png")
                raise
